name: Abigail
testimonial: ISCF has ministered to me in ways that have deeply strengthened my faith and shaped my walk with God. Through the fellowship, teachings, and genuine love within the community, I have experienced spiritual growth that I didn't even realize I needed. Weekly bible study helped me understand the Word more deeply and the worship helped me connect with Him more deeply. Long detailed discussion helped me grasp the core concept and how to implement it in my daily life. I was especially blessed by the encouragement. ISCF has truly been a source of renewal, blessing, and inspiration in my life.

name: Steven
testimonial:
Starting my journey at ODU as an international student was both exciting and challenging. Adjusting to a new academic environment, culture, and life away from home wasn't always easy, but ISCF made a meaningful difference from the very beginning. The welcoming community helped me feel connected and supported during my transition.

Through Bible studies, fellowship events, and meaningful conversations, I was able to grow in my faith while building lasting friendships with students from different backgrounds. ISCF provided a place where I felt encouraged, valued, and able to grow both personally and spiritually. It became more than just a student organization—it became a community that made ODU feel like home.

name: Michal Aiden
testimonial: ISCF has been a great blessing in my life as an international student from Pakistan. Coming to a new country was not easy for me. I felt nervous and unsure about many things, but ISCF welcomed me with kindness and care. It helped me feel comfortable and supported in this new environment. Through ISCF, I made good friends who encouraged me and made me feel strong like I belong. It also helped me to grow in my faith and gave me guidance when I needed it. I am very thankful for ISCF because they made my journey easier and filled my life with the Word, hope, friendship and peace.

name: Bhuvanesh
testimonial:
As an ODU alumnus and former member of the International Student Christian Fellowship (ISCF), I am deeply grateful for the community that played a significant role in my personal and spiritual growth. ISCF provided a welcoming environment where I developed lasting friendships, strengthened my faith, and had opportunities to grow as a leader.

The experiences and relationships I gained through ISCF have continued to shape my life well beyond my time at ODU. I will always value the support, encouragement, and sense of belonging that ISCF provided, and I am thankful to have been part of a community that continues to positively impact international students.
currentPosition: Alumni ODU and ISCF member from India
